Enamorus

#0904 Overqwil #0906 Sprigatito
  • Contents
  • Info
  • Base stats
  • Evolution chart
  • Pokédex entries
  • Moves learned
  • Sprites
  • Locations
  • Language

Enamorus is a Fairy/Flying type Pokémon introduced in Generation 8.

New Pokémon available in Pokémon Legends: Arceus. It is related to Tornadus/Thundurus/Landorus.

Incarnate Forme Therian Forme

Additional artwork

Pokédex data

National № 0905
Type Fairy Flying
Species Love-Hate Pokémon
Height 1.6 m (5′03″)
Weight 48.0 kg (105.8 lbs)
Abilities 1. Cute Charm
Contrary (hidden ability)
Local № 0234 (Legends: Arceus)

Training

EV yield 3 Sp. Atk
Catch rate 3 (0.4% with PokéBall, full HP)
Base Friendship 50 (normal)
Base Exp. 116
Growth Rate Slow

Breeding

Egg Groups Undiscovered
Gender 0% male, 100% female
Egg cycles 20 (4,884–5,140 steps)

Evolution chart

  • Enamorus does not evolve.

Enamorus changes

  • In Generation 8, Enamorus (Incarnate Forme) has the Healer ability.

Pokédex entries

Incarnate Forme

Legends: Arceus When it flies to this land from across the sea, the bitter winter comes to an end. According to legend, this Pokémon’s love gives rise to the budding of fresh life across Hisui.

Therian Forme

Legends: Arceus A different guise from its feminine humanoid form. From the clouds, it descends upon those who treat any form of life with disrespect and metes out wrathful, ruthless punishment.

Moves learned by Enamorus

  • In other generations
  • 8
  • 9
Legends: Z-A Scarlet/Violet

Moves learnt by level up

Enamorus does not learn any level up moves in Pokémon Legends: Z-A.

Moves learnt by TM

Enamorus cannot be taught any TM moves in Pokémon Legends: Z-A.

Moves learnt by level up

Enamorus learns the following moves in Pokémon Scarlet & Violet at the levels specified.

Egg moves

Enamorus does not learn any moves by breeding in Pokémon Scarlet & Violet.

Other languages

English Enamorus
Japanese ラブトロス
German Cupidos
French Amovénus

Spanish Enamorus

Chinese (Simplified) 眷恋云
Chinese (Traditional) 眷戀雲

 

English Love-Hate Pokémon
Japanese あいぞうポケモン
German Hassliebe-Pokémon
French Pokémon Hainamour
Italian Pokémon Amoreodio
Spanish Pokémon Amorodio
Korean 애증포켓몬
Chinese (Simplified) 爱憎宝可梦
Chinese (Traditional) 愛憎寶可夢

Name origin

enamor
to fill with love
-us
common cloud suffix; possession of a given quality
#0904 Overqwil #0906 Sprigatito
